title: BEM-921 curator response
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_RESPONSE.md with content # BEM-921 SYSTEM PROTOCOL V2 RESPONSE
Status: APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Findings:
- Worker approves the new full-system protocol version with requirements.
- The protocol must not be Telegram-only.
- It must include exact internal contour algorithm and not simplify it to Analyst -> Executor -> Auditor.
- The accepted internal contour algorithm is Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor with revision cycles through Analyst until auditor-approved result.
- Workspaces belong to internal contours, not individual elements.
- Curator is a role and object element. Curator inherits system/object/channel rules and only uses contour rules if explicitly assigned to a contour.
- Analyst/Auditor/Executor are typical role elements inside contours and inherit system/object/contour rules/properties and experience refs.
- Local individual element rules are excluded by default.
- Vertical communication is between curators. Horizontal communication is Auditor of contour A to Analyst of contour B, or Analyst B request to Auditor A.
- GitHub Actions and runners are activation/proof mechanisms, not roles.
- Event log and managed channel must record transitions.
- Telegram remains one module; main top-level route is GD Curator, but other curator Telegram routes may be registered.
Evidence:
- governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM921_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_REQUEST.md
- governance/audit/internal/results/BEM921_WORKER_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V2_REVIEW.md
- governance/reports/BEM920_SYSTEM_EVOLUTION_PROTOCOL.md
Required protocol output:
- Full DOCX/ZIP protocol with detailed roadmap.
- Full prompt appendix with object prompts, role templates, contour overlays, channel/runner operational contracts.
- Tables for existing and new prompts for operator approval.
- BEM-920..BEM-928 roadmap mapped to Claude requirements and operator decisions.
Recommendation:
- Submit BEM-921 protocol v2 to operator for review.
No issue comments.
